name: Snapfire
description: Beadie and Mortimer. We're kind of a package deal.

abilities.name: Scatterblast
abilities.description: Unloads a blast that damages and applies a movement speed slow to enemy units within a cone. The blast is more effective at point-blank distance. Snapfire unloads with a wide blast, the point-blank distance is applied to enemy units closest to her.

abilities.name: Firesnap Cookie
abilities.description: Beatrix feeds a potent cookie to an allied unit, causing it to hop a short distance. The affected unit stuns and damages enemy units within the landing radius. The Firesnap Cookie now heals the affected allied unit while launching a singular, less potent Mortimer Kisses firespit to the landing destination.

abilities.name: Lil' Shredder
abilities.description: Heats up her mounted turret to rapidly fire a number of fixed-damage attacks while applying an armor reduction to the affected enemy unit. Grants self bonus attack range for the duration.

abilities.name: Gobble Up
abilities.description: Mortimer gobbles up an allied unit, which he can then spit toward enemy units. The unit stays in his belly for a fixed duration, and is released after the max duration if Spit Out is not cast.

abilities.name: Mortimer Kisses
abilities.description: These globs cause impact damage and create pools of firespit that applies a movement speed slow and damage over time. Each glob's landing location can be targeted with an attack order.
